name: required
description: Whether a semantic schema member must be present in instances of its parent schema.

aiGuidance.purpose: Distinguishes required schema members from schema members that may be absent. This is schema-member requiredness, not Type FieldAssignment.required.
aiGuidance.extraction: Set true only when the source specification requires this schema member/property to be present in the represented data shape. Do not use this field to describe whether an SRS Type includes a required FieldAssignment.
